unexpectedError.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

notFound.message: The requested resource was not found.

unauthorized.message: You are not authorized to access this resource.

forbidden.message: You do not have permission to access this resource.

badRequest.message: The request was invalid or cannot be served. Please check your input.

conflict.message: There was a conflict with the request. Please check your input or try again.

serviceUnavailable.message: The service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
